title: lotus loweanus
intro: Lotus loweanus, also known as Lotus corniculatus, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lotus loweanus include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Lotus loweanus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in topical creams and ointments.
